response.justification: Bogdan is a capable polyglot engineer with solid fundamentals and genuine experience at high-throughput scale (millions of requests/second at Sociomantic), but the resume shows no meaningful overlap with the core requirements of this role: there is no mention of A/B testing, experimentation frameworks, feature flagging, rollout automation, telemetry infrastructure, or growth measurement platforms. The position is Principal/IC6 and demands 4+ years of dedicated experimentation systems ownership and cross-team platform leadership; Bogdan's most senior recent title is Staff Software Engineer held for six months, and his current status is a career gap. The breadth of his background is a positive signal for general engineering ability but does not substitute for the domain-specific depth this role requires.
strengths: Polyglot engineer proficient in multiple required languages (C, C++, JavaScript/TypeScript, Java, C#) with real production use across the career
Demonstrated high-throughput distributed systems experience at Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency, async I/O design
Strong software craftsmanship culture (TDD, trunk-based development, CI/CD) and community knowledge-sharing through workshops and open-source contributions
concerns: Zero experimentation platform experience — no A/B testing, feature flagging, experiment assignment/targeting, rollout automation, or bias detection anywhere in the resume
No metrics, telemetry, or growth measurement systems work — the role's foundational requirement is instrumentation and experimental analysis infrastructure, which is entirely absent
Seniority and scope gap — no evidence of multi-team initiative leadership or cross-functional stakeholder alignment at the Principal/IC6 level; most recent substantial role is Senior Developer
